identity_status: STRONG ALIGNMENT - The Compounding Maintenance loop is functional and observable.
major_strengths: Successfully closed the acquisition-deterioration-restoration maintenance loop.
Deterministic and bounded restoration prevents economy inflation.
Zero-Durability persistence preserves item identity while enforcing consequence.
Granular durability and repair evidence captured in transcripts for auditing.
major_risks: High maintenance predictability may lead to mechanical play styles.
Material Oversupply (potential lack of strategic scarcity in victory loot).
balance_questions: Should repair cost scale with item operational profile (e.g. Repair Pressure)?
Should broken gear increase combat risk (DEFEAT_DROP probability)?
Is material drop rate balanced for long-term sustainability?
required_followups: Implement active strategic penalties for 0-durability gear.
Conduct scarcity audit on material drop rates.
